title: Agentic Workspace local work thread
description: Ignored local-only continuation handle used to resume one actor's work without treating local cursor state as durable task, proof, or closure evidence.

created_at.description: ISO-like timestamp for initial thread creation.

updated_at.description: ISO-like timestamp for the last local cursor update.

source.description: Optional local source, such as local_work_thread or local_chat_checkpoint.

refs.description: Durable owner references this local cursor points at.

issues.description: Issue references this local thread points at.

items.description: One issue reference or issue URL.

prs.description: Pull request references this local thread points at.

items.description: One pull request number, reference, or URL.

planning.description: Checked-in Planning owners or selectors to reread before durable claims.

items.description: One Planning path, selector, or owner reference.

durable_sources.description: Durable sources to reread before making claims from this local handle.

observations.description: Stale-prone branch, worktree, and owner observations.

repo_root.description: Repository root observed when the local thread was written.

remote_origin_url.description: Origin remote URL observed when available.

branch.description: Git branch observed when the local thread was written.

worktree.description: Worktree path observed when the local thread was written.

head_commit.description: Local HEAD commit observed when the local thread was written.

planning_revision.description: Planning revision observed when a Planning owner was relevant.

dirty_state_summary.description: Short local dirty-state summary observed when the thread was written.

proof_state.description: Historical local proof summary with invalidation rules.

status.description: Whether this thread has local proof history.

last_proof.description: Historical proof commands or receipts recorded for orientation.

items.description: One historical proof command or receipt summary.

stale_if.description: Conditions that invalidate the local proof history.

rule.description: Rule preventing local proof history from becoming completion evidence.

command.description: Advisory command for resuming from this local thread.

selector.description: Optional AW selector related to the resume route.

local_notes.description: Short advisory note; raw transcripts and durable policy text are not allowed.

limits.description: Invariant flags that keep local work threads from becoming durable task or proof state.

local_only.description: Thread records are only for the local workspace.

gitignored.description: Thread records must remain under ignored local storage.

advisory.description: Thread records are advisory hints, not durable authority.

not_closure_evidence.description: Thread records cannot prove issue, PR, or plan closure.

no_raw_transcripts.description: Thread records must not contain raw chat transcript content.

no_secrets.description: Thread records must not contain secrets or authentication material.

no_priority_status_assignment.description: Thread records must not introduce task-manager priority, status, owner, or assignment semantics.

durable_decisions_require_durable_source.description: Durable decisions must be backed by durable sources outside this local record.

observed_at.description: Timestamp when this observation was captured.
